description: Perform a comprehensive HTTPS and protocol security audit of https://crawler-test.com/ using Screaming Frog SEO Spider (Login: user=ga). Export the security data to ~/Documents/SEO/exports/security_tab_export.csv and the internal data to ~/Documents/SEO/exports/internal_all_export.csv. Create a security audit report at ~/Documents/SEO/reports/security_audit_report.txt including the total URL count, HTTPS vs HTTP breakdown, assessment of mixed content issues, assessment of HSTS headers, and at least 3 specific remediation recommendations.
